mapper.select: SELECT t.template_id, t.template_name, t.equipment_type, t.inspection_kind, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspection_items i WHERE i.template_id = t.template_id) AS item_count, t.updated_at, t.sort_order FROM inspection_template t WHERE t.template_id = #{templateId}
mapper.update: UPDATE inspection_template SET template_name = #{templateName}, equipment_type = #{equipmentType}, inspection_kind = #{inspectionKind}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE template_id = #{templateId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inspection_template ( template_name, equipment_type, inspection_kind, sort_order ) SELECT CONCAT(template_name, '_コピー'), equipment_type, inspection_kind, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_order), 0) + 1 FROM inspection_template) FROM inspection_template WHERE template_id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE inspection_template SET sort_order = CASE template_id WHEN #{id1} THEN (SELECT sort_order FROM inspection_template WHERE template_id = #{id2}) WHEN #{id2} THEN (SELECT sort_order FROM inspection_template WHERE template_id = #{id1}) END WHERE template_id IN (#{id1}, #{id2})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM inspection_items WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND item_level = #{itemLevel}
